Localization.Description: Possible execution of the SilentTrinity stager is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The process {subject.process.name} loaded the module {object.name} whose metainfo is specific to the SilentTrinity stager
The user {subject.account.name} started the process {object.name} whose metainfo is specific to the SilentTrinity stager
The user {subject.account.name} executed the PowerShell command whose snippets are specific to the SilentTrinity stager
